body:
{title: [Verse]}
Am F E


{comment: Verse}

Come and [Am]sprinkle me with hyssop.
Lord and I [F]will be [Am]clean. Come and wash me
Holy God and I'll be whiter [F]than snow
I'll sing glory [Am]to the [E]Father, sing [Am]glory
to the Son[E]
Sing [Am]glory to the holy [F]spirit [E][Am]glory [F][E][E7]everyone
[Am][F][Am]Alleluia,alleluia,alle-alleluia,
[Am][F][E]Alleluia,alleluia,alle-alleluia!
I'll sing glory [Am]to the [E]Father,
sing glory [Am]to the son[E]
Sing glory [Am]to the Holy [F]Spirit [E][Am]glory [F][E][E7]Everyone

(Then Fade Slowly.....)
title: [Verse]
raw_text:
Am F E


[Verse]

        Am
Come and sprinkle me with hyssop.
              F       Am
Lord and I will be clean. Come and wash me
                              F
Holy God and I'll be whiter than snow
                 Am        E        Am
I'll sing glory to the Father, sing glory
              E
to the Son
         Am               F    E Am F E E7
Sing glory to the holy spirit glory everyone
        Am            F    Am
Alleluia,alleluia,alle-alleluia,
        Am           F E
Alleluia,alleluia,alle-alleluia!
                Am        E
I'll sing glory to the Father,
          Am         E
sing glory to the son
          Am                F E Am F E E7
Sing glory to the Holy Spirit glory Everyone

(Then Fade Slowly.....)
